j=string.sub local r=table.concat local U=e local H=string.char local N=table.insert local K=string.len local S=type local c=math.floor for e=802526-802525,#U,245793-245792 do local T=U[e]if S(T)=="\115\116\114\105\110\103"then local S=K(T)local F={}local a=832485+-832484 local C=-126504+126504 local X=863862-863862 while a<=S do local e=j(T,a,a)local r=z[e]if r then C=C+r*(-490257-(-490321))^((1007861+-1007858)-X)X=X+(825131+-825130)if X==713751-713747 then X=693855+-693855 local e=c(C/(-182605+248141))local z=c((C%(734951-669415))/(207479-207223))local j=C%(228947+-228691)N(F,H(e,z,j))C=6823-6823 end elseif e=="\061"then N(F,H(c(C/(-934312-(-999848)))))if a>=S or j(T,a+(595095+-595094),a+(425244+-425243))~="\061"then N(F,H(c((C%(-67271+132807))/(804936-804680))))end break end a=a+(-42095+42096)end U[e]=r(F)end end end return(function(e,r,U,H,N,K,S,F,y,M,j,f,P,X,c,J,C,a,T,n)c,C,X,y,T,F,n,f,j,M,J,a,P={},function(e)for z=-88156-(-88157),#e,-428926+428927 do T[e[z]]=T[e[z]]+(13351+-13350)end if U then local j=U(true)local r=N(j)r[z(-415458+440694)],r[z(-843475+868535)],r[z(-86236+111347)]=e,X,function()return 805259-(-519812)end return j else return H({},{[z(-1030021+1055081)]=X;[z(-797868+823104)]=e,[z(294182+-269071)]=function()return 551479+773592 end})end end,function(e)local z,j=345458-345457,e[-155452+155453]while j do T[j],z=T[j]-(601584+-601583),(-388644-(-388645))+z if-486241-(-486241)==T[j]then T[j],c[j]=nil,nil end j=e[z]end end,function(e,z)local r=C(z)local U=function(U,H,N)return j(e,{U;H,N},z,r)end return U end,{},function()a=(785697-785696)+a T[a]=835752+-835751 return a end,function(e,z)local r=C(z)local U=function(U,H,N,K)return j(e,{U;H;N,K},z,r)end return U end,function(e,z)local r=C(z)local U=function()return j(e,{},z,r)end return U end,function(j,U,H,N)local E,X,O,x,p,s,a,S,o,G,b,u,g,T,Q,k,t,v,W,h,m,A,I,R,M,V,w,D,Y,d,Z,C,i,l while j do if j<7516527-(-592011)then if j<-440800+3270328
